comment: Pitch notation: 0=C, 1=C#, 0.5=C quarter-sharp (+50¢), 9.7≈7th partial of C (970¢). Octave = 12.0. Pitches must be sorted ascending and stay within [0, 12).

tunings.name: Kirnberger III
tunings.description: Well-temperament. Four 1/4-comma narrow fifths C-G-D-A-E give pure major third C-E (386¢). Remaining fifths pure. Warm in C major, increasingly bright toward F#. Bach-associated.

tunings.name: Vallotti
tunings.description: Well-temperament. Six narrow fifths (F-C-G-D-A-E-B, each -1/6 Pythagorean comma = ~3.9¢), six pure. Thirds gradually sharpen as you move away from C toward F#.

tunings.name: DCA Beta
tunings.description: Vallotti backbone + three JI microtones: 0.5 (C↑, +50¢), 5.5 (F↑, 11/8 zone, 550¢), 9.7 (Bb↓, 7th partial, 970¢). Edit pitches[] freely — add, remove, or tweak values. Sorted ascending required.
